'''tamacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylidide|xylidide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylidide|xylidide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tamacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmæchæth|tæmæchæth]] || [[word:tæmæchæj|tæmæchæj]] || [[word:tæmæchæsh|tæmæchæsh]] || [[word:tæmæchæ|tæmæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamamachath|tamamachath]] || [[word:tamamachaj|tamamachaj]] || [[word:tamamachash|tamamachash]] || [[word:tamamacha|tamamacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamachath|tamachath]] || [[word:tamachaj|tamachaj]] || [[word:tamachash|tamachash]] || [[word:tamacha|tamacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamafchath|tamafchath]] || [[word:tamafchaj|tamafchaj]] || [[word:tamafchash|tamafchash]] || [[word:tamafchaf|tamafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamachatha|tamachatha]] || [[word:tamachaja|tamachaja]] || [[word:tamachasha|tamachasha]] || [[word:tamachaka|tamachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamachath|tamachath]] || [[word:tamachaj|tamachaj]] || [[word:tamachash|tamachash]] || [[word:tamacha|tamacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamachathal|tamachathal]] || [[word:tamachajal|tamachajal]] || [[word:tamachashal|tamachashal]] || [[word:tamachakal|tamachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamachathatha|tamachathatha]] || [[word:tamachajaja|tamachajaja]] || [[word:tamachashasha|tamachashasha]] || [[word:tamachaka|tamachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamachathan|tamachathan]] || [[word:tamachajan|tamachajan]] || [[word:tamachashan|tamachashan]] || [[word:tamachakan|tamachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamachathaoro|tamachathaoro]] || [[word:tamachajaoro|tamachajaoro]] || [[word:tamachashaoro|tamachashaoro]] || [[word:tamachakaoro|tamachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
